components.name: Button
components.description: Primary action element with multiple variants and sizes
components.usage: Use primary for main actions, secondary for alternatives, tertiary for low-emphasis. One primary button per view.
components.a11y: Use native <button>. Include visible text or aria-label. 4.5:1 contrast.

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input field with label, helper text, validation states, and optional icons
components.usage: Always pair with a visible label. Show error messages below the field. Use helper text for format hints.
components.a11y: Associate label via for/id. Use aria-describedby for helper/error text. aria-invalid on error.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Selection control for binary or indeterminate choices
components.usage: Use for multi-select lists or boolean toggles. Use indeterminate for parent checkboxes controlling a group.
components.a11y: Use native <input type='checkbox'>. Wrap in <label> or use aria-labelledby.

components.name: Radio
components.description: Single-selection control within a group of mutually exclusive options
components.usage: Use within a radio group for mutually exclusive options. Always provide a group label with fieldset/legend.
components.a11y: Use native <input type='radio'> inside <fieldset> with <legend>. All radios in group share same name.

components.name: Toggle/Switch
components.description: Binary toggle for on/off states with optional label
components.usage: Use for instant-apply settings (no submit needed). Prefer over checkbox when the change takes immediate effect.
components.a11y: Use role='switch' with aria-checked. Include visible label text.

components.name: Select
components.description: Dropdown selection control with search, multi-select, and grouped options
components.usage: Use for picking from 5+ options. For fewer options, prefer radio buttons. Use searchable for long lists.
components.a11y: Use aria-expanded, aria-haspopup='listbox'. Keyboard nav with arrow keys, Enter to select, Escape to close.

components.name: File Upload
components.description: Drag-and-drop or click-to-browse file upload area with progress and preview
components.usage: Use the full-size variant for primary upload flows. Compact variant for inline/secondary uploads. Show progress and file preview after selection.
components.a11y: Include a visible label. Use aria-describedby for accepted formats/size limits. Announce upload progress to screen readers.

components.name: Slider/Range
components.description: Range slider for numeric value selection with single or dual thumbs
components.usage: Use for numeric values within a known range. Show current value label. Use range mode for min/max selection.
components.a11y: Use native <input type='range'> or role='slider'. Provide aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, aria-valuenow, aria-valuetext.

components.name: Date Picker
components.description: Calendar-based date selection with single date, range, and preset options
components.usage: Use for date entry where calendar context is helpful. For known dates (birthdays), a plain text input may be better.
components.a11y: Full keyboard navigation. Announce month/year changes. Use role='grid' for calendar. Escape closes the popover.

components.name: Color Picker
components.description: Color selection control with palette swatches, hex/RGB input, and alpha
components.usage: Use for theme/branding customization. Provide brand-relevant preset swatches. Show live preview of selected color.
components.a11y: Label the trigger clearly. Ensure swatch buttons have accessible names for their color values.

components.name: OTP Input
components.description: One-time password input with auto-focus advance between digit fields
components.usage: Use for verification codes. Auto-advance focus on digit entry. Support paste of full code. Clear on error.
components.a11y: Group inputs with role='group' and aria-label. Use inputmode='numeric' for mobile keyboards. Announce errors.

components.name: Tag Input
components.description: Multi-value text input that creates removable tags/chips on Enter or comma
components.usage: Use for multi-value inputs like tags, emails, or categories. Support Enter and comma as delimiters. Allow backspace to remove last tag.
components.a11y: Announce tag additions/removals. Each tag's remove button needs an accessible label. Use aria-live for count updates.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact label for status, count, or category indicators
components.usage: Use for status labels, counts, and categories. Keep text short (1-2 words). Use dot variant for simple status indicators.
components.a11y: Ensure sufficient contrast. If badge conveys status, use aria-label to provide context beyond the visual.

components.name: Card
components.description: Contained surface for grouping related content with optional header, media, and actions
components.usage: Use to group related content. Interactive cards should have a clear click target. Don't nest cards inside cards.
components.a11y: If clickable, use <a> or <button> as the root, or use role='link'/role='button'. Provide a clear accessible name.

components.name: Table
components.description: Basic data table with sortable columns, row selection, and striped rows
components.usage: Use for structured data with consistent columns. Keep column count manageable. Use compact for dense data views.
components.a11y: Use semantic <table>, <thead>, <tbody>, <th scope>. Announce sort state with aria-sort. Use role='checkbox' for row selection.

components.name: Data Table Advanced
components.description: Feature-rich table with pagination, filtering, column resizing, row expansion, and bulk actions
components.usage: Use for complex data sets needing filtering, pagination, or bulk operations. Prefer basic Table for simple displays.
components.a11y: Announce page changes and filter results. Bulk action buttons include count in label. Column resize via keyboard.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: User or entity representation with image, initials, or icon fallback
components.usage: Use for user profiles, comment authors, and team members. Avatar groups overlap for compact display. Limit groups to 5 visible.
components.a11y: Provide meaningful alt text. Status indicator needs aria-label (e.g., 'Online'). Decorative avatars use alt=''.

components.name: Rating Stars
components.description: Star-based rating display and interactive input with half-star support
components.usage: Use readonly for displaying existing ratings. Interactive for user input. Show numeric value alongside stars for clarity.
components.a11y: Use role='radiogroup' for interactive, role='img' with aria-label for readonly. Announce selected rating.

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Metric display with value, label, trend indicator, and optional sparkline
components.usage: Use in dashboard layouts for KPI display. Group 3-4 stat cards in a row. Show trend for time-comparative metrics.
components.a11y: Use clear label text. Trend indicator should have text alternative (e.g., '+12% increase'). Don't rely on color alone.

components.name: Timeline
components.description: Vertical chronological display of events with icons, timestamps, and content
components.usage: Use for event history, changelog, or step-by-step progress. Most recent events first. Keep individual entries concise.
components.a11y: Use <ol> for ordered timelines. Each item has a clear timestamp and description. Icons are decorative (aria-hidden).

components.name: Activity Feed
components.description: Real-time feed of user actions with actor, action, target, and timestamp
components.usage: Use for audit logs, social feeds, or collaboration activity. Group related activities. Paginate or infinite-scroll for long feeds.
components.a11y: Use <ul> or role='feed'. New items announced with aria-live='polite'. Relative timestamps include full date in title attribute.

components.name: Pills/Chips
components.description: Compact interactive elements for filters, selections, or tags with optional remove
components.usage: Use for filter selections and tag displays. Active state indicates currently applied filters. Removable for user-created items.
components.a11y: Use role='option' within a listbox for filter chips. Remove buttons need accessible labels including the chip text.

components.name: Notification Badge
components.description: Numeric or dot indicator overlaid on icons or avatars for unread counts
components.usage: Use for unread notifications, messages, or pending items. Dot variant for generic 'new' indicator. Cap display at max value (99+).
components.a11y: Include count in parent element's aria-label (e.g., 'Notifications, 5 unread'). Don't rely on badge alone.

components.name: Date/Time Display
components.description: Formatted date and time display with relative timestamps and timezone support
components.usage: Use relative for recent times ('2 hours ago'), absolute for specific dates. Show full date on hover via title attribute.
components.a11y: Use <time> element with datetime attribute. Full date in title for relative displays.

components.name: Metadata Grid
components.description: Key-value pair grid for displaying entity details and properties
components.usage: Use for detail views showing entity properties. Consistent label alignment. Group related fields together.
components.a11y: Use <dl>, <dt>, <dd> for semantic key-value pairs. Ensure label-value association is clear.

components.name: Status Indicator
components.description: Colored dot or icon with label indicating current state of an entity
components.usage: Use alongside labels, never color alone. Pulse animation for live/active states. Combine with text for clarity.
components.a11y: Always include a text label. Color is supplementary, not the sole indicator. Use aria-label if label is hidden.

components.name: Modal
components.description: Overlay dialog for focused tasks, confirmations, or complex forms
components.usage: Use for tasks requiring focus. Keep content minimal. Always provide a close mechanism. Avoid stacking modals.
components.a11y: Use <dialog> or role='dialog' with aria-modal='true'. Trap focus inside. Return focus to trigger on close. aria-labelledby for title.

components.name: Toast/Alert
components.description: Temporary notification messages for success, error, warning, and info feedback
components.usage: Use for transient feedback after user actions. Errors should persist until dismissed. Stack multiple toasts vertically.
components.a11y: Use role='alert' for errors, role='status' for success/info. Don't auto-dismiss errors. Provide dismiss button.

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Determinate or indeterminate progress indicator with optional label and percentage
components.usage: Use determinate when progress is known. Indeterminate for unknown duration. Show percentage for long operations.
components.a11y: Use role='progressbar' with aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax. Provide aria-label describing the operation.

components.name: Loading Skeleton
components.description: Placeholder shimmer elements matching content layout during loading states
components.usage: Match skeleton shapes to expected content layout. Use for initial page loads, not button loading states. Reduce layout shift.
components.a11y: Use aria-busy='true' on the loading container. Include aria-label='Loading' on the skeleton region.

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Placeholder for empty lists, search results, or initial states with illustration and CTA
components.usage: Use for empty lists, no search results, or first-use states. Always provide a clear action. Be encouraging, not blaming.
components.a11y: Ensure heading hierarchy is maintained. Action button is keyboard accessible. Illustration is decorative (aria-hidden).

components.name: Alert Banner
components.description: Full-width persistent banner for system-level messages, warnings, or announcements
components.usage: Use for system-wide messages at the top of the page. Errors and warnings should be persistent. Info can be dismissible.
components.a11y: Use role='alert' for urgent messages. Include dismiss button with aria-label. Don't auto-dismiss errors.

components.name: Snackbar
components.description: Brief bottom-anchored message with optional undo action, auto-dismissing
components.usage: Use for lightweight confirmations like 'Item deleted' with undo. Keep message under 2 lines. One snackbar at a time.
components.a11y: Use role='status' for non-critical. Undo action must be keyboard accessible. Pause auto-dismiss on hover/focus.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Horizontal or vertical tab navigation for switching between content panels
components.usage: Use for related content views at the same hierarchy level. 3-7 tabs max. Don't use for sequential steps (use Stepper).
components.a11y: Use role='tablist', role='tab', role='tabpanel'. Arrow keys navigate tabs. aria-selected on active tab. aria-controls linking.

components.name: Breadcrumbs
components.description: Hierarchical path trail showing current page location within site structure
components.usage: Use for hierarchical navigation deeper than 2 levels. Current page is the last item (not a link). Collapse middle items on overflow.
components.a11y: Use <nav aria-label='Breadcrumb'> with <ol>. Current page uses aria-current='page'. Separator is decorative.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Page navigation controls with page numbers, prev/next, and page size selector
components.usage: Use for paginated lists/tables. Show first/last page for long lists. Compact variant for tight spaces.
components.a11y: Use <nav aria-label='Pagination'>. Current page uses aria-current='page'. Prev/Next buttons have clear labels.

components.name: Sidebar Nav
components.description: Vertical navigation sidebar with nested items, icons, sections, and collapse
components.usage: Use for app-level navigation. Support collapse for more content space. Group related items in sections. Highlight active item.
components.a11y: Use <nav aria-label='Main navigation'>. Collapsible sections use aria-expanded. Active item uses aria-current='page'.

components.name: Tree View
components.description: Hierarchical expandable/collapsible tree for nested data like file systems
components.usage: Use for hierarchical data navigation (files, categories, org charts). Lazy-load deep branches. Indicate expandable nodes.
components.a11y: Use role='tree', role='treeitem', role='group'. Arrow keys for navigation. aria-expanded on branches.

components.name: Stepper
components.description: Multi-step progress indicator showing completed, current, and upcoming steps
components.usage: Use for multi-step workflows (checkout, onboarding). 3-7 steps max. Allow going back to completed steps. Show current step clearly.
components.a11y: Use aria-current='step' on active. Completed steps use aria-label including 'completed'. Step numbers visible.

components.name: Mega Menu
components.description: Full-width dropdown navigation panel with categorized links, icons, and featured content
components.usage: Use for sites with many top-level categories. Open on hover (desktop) or click (mobile). Include a featured/promoted section.
components.a11y: Trigger uses aria-expanded, aria-haspopup='true'. Escape closes. Tab navigates within panel. Focus trap when open.

components.name: Bottom Navigation
components.description: Mobile-oriented fixed bottom navigation bar with icons and labels
components.usage: Use for mobile apps with 3-5 primary destinations. Icons required, labels strongly recommended. Fixed to bottom of viewport.
components.a11y: Use <nav> with role='navigation'. Active item uses aria-current. Items are focusable with clear labels.

components.name: Segmented Control
components.description: Inline toggle between 2-5 mutually exclusive views or filter options
components.usage: Use for toggling between 2-5 views or modes. Not for navigation between pages. All options should be related and parallel.
components.a11y: Use role='radiogroup' with role='radio' items. Arrow keys navigate. aria-checked on selected.

components.name: Section Header
components.description: Page or section title with optional description, badge, and action buttons
components.usage: Use at the top of pages or major sections. One H1 per page. Include action buttons for primary section operations.
components.a11y: Use proper heading hierarchy (h1-h6). Actions are keyboard accessible. Badge provides supplementary info.

components.name: CTA Banner
components.description: Promotional or action-oriented banner with headline, description, and call-to-action buttons
components.usage: Use sparingly for high-priority promotions or upgrades. One CTA banner per view. Ensure clear value proposition.
components.a11y: Use role='banner' or a semantic section. CTA buttons have clear action text. Dismissible has accessible close button.

components.name: Divider
components.description: Horizontal or vertical line separator with optional label for visual grouping
components.usage: Use to separate content groups. Don't overuse -- spacing alone is often enough. Label variant for 'or' separators in forms.
components.a11y: Use role='separator'. Decorative dividers use aria-hidden='true'. Labeled dividers include the text accessibly.

components.name: Drawer/Sheet
components.description: Slide-in panel from edge of screen for secondary content, filters, or detail views
components.usage: Use for detail views, filters, or forms that don't warrant a full page. Right-side for detail, left for navigation, bottom for mobile.
components.a11y: Same as Modal: role='dialog', aria-modal='true', focus trap, aria-labelledby. Return focus on close.

components.name: Kanban Board
components.description: Column-based drag-and-drop board for workflow and task management
components.usage: Use for workflow visualization (To Do / In Progress / Done). Horizontal scroll for many columns. Show card count per column.
components.a11y: Use aria-roledescription='Kanban board'. Drag-and-drop has keyboard alternative (move via menu). Announce card movements.

components.name: Toolbar
components.description: Horizontal bar with grouped action buttons, toggles, and controls for content manipulation
components.usage: Use above content areas for actions (text editor toolbar, table actions). Group related actions. Use separators between groups.
components.a11y: Use role='toolbar'. Arrow keys navigate between items. Items use aria-pressed for toggle state.

components.name: Image Gallery
components.description: Grid or carousel display of images with lightbox, thumbnails, and zoom
components.usage: Use grid for uniform thumbnails, masonry for mixed aspect ratios, carousel for featured images. Always provide lightbox for detail view.
components.a11y: All images have alt text. Lightbox traps focus. Carousel has pause button. Arrow key navigation.

components.name: Audio Player
components.description: Audio playback controls with play/pause, seek, volume, speed, and waveform visualization
components.usage: Use default variant for primary audio content. Compact for inline playback. Mini for minimal controls in lists.
components.a11y: All controls have accessible labels. Keyboard shortcuts for play/pause (Space), seek (arrows), volume (up/down). Announce track changes.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Contextual text popup on hover/focus for supplementary information
components.usage: Use for brief supplementary text (1-2 lines). Not for essential info -- users may not discover tooltips. Don't put interactive content inside.
components.a11y: Use aria-describedby linking trigger to tooltip. Show on focus as well as hover. Dismiss with Escape.

components.name: Dropdown Menu
components.description: Action menu triggered by a button with items, dividers, icons, and keyboard navigation
components.usage: Use for actions on a specific item (row actions, more menu). Group related items with dividers. Show destructive actions in error color.
components.a11y: Trigger uses aria-expanded, aria-haspopup='menu'. Menu uses role='menu', items role='menuitem'. Arrow keys, Enter, Escape.

components.name: Popover
components.description: Rich content popup anchored to a trigger, supporting forms, lists, and interactive content
components.usage: Use for rich interactive content that doesn't warrant a modal (mini forms, preview cards). Click-triggered for interactive content.
components.a11y: Trigger uses aria-expanded. Popover has role='dialog' if interactive. Focus managed inside. Escape closes.

components.name: Command Palette
components.description: Keyboard-driven searchable command launcher for quick navigation and actions
components.usage: Trigger with Cmd/Ctrl+K. Show recent commands first. Group by category. Support fuzzy search. Display keyboard shortcuts.
components.a11y: Use role='combobox' with aria-expanded. Results use role='listbox'. Arrow keys navigate. Enter executes. Escape closes.

components.name: Accordion
components.description: Vertically stacked collapsible sections for progressive disclosure of content
components.usage: Use for FAQs, settings groups, or long forms. Allow multiple open for reference content. Single open for focused reading.
components.a11y: Use <details>/<summary> or role='region' with aria-expanded buttons. Arrow keys between headers. Enter/Space toggles.

components.name: Comment/Thread
components.description: Threaded discussion component with replies, reactions, and author info
components.usage: Use for discussions, code review, or feedback threads. Indent replies to show hierarchy. Show newest replies last.
components.a11y: Use <article> for each comment. Time element for timestamps. Reply forms are keyboard accessible. Announce new replies.

components.name: Notification Panel
components.description: Grouped notification list with read/unread states, categories, and mark-all-read action
components.usage: Use in a dropdown or drawer. Group by date or type. Unread items visually distinct. Provide mark-all-read shortcut.
components.a11y: Use role='list' for notifications. Unread indicated with aria-label. New notifications announced with aria-live.

components.name: Calendar View
components.description: Full calendar display with month/week/day views, event rendering, and drag-to-create
components.usage: Use month view for overview, week for scheduling, day for detailed timeline. Color-code event categories. Show today prominently.
components.a11y: Use role='grid' for calendar. Navigate dates with arrow keys. Events are focusable with full details in label. Announce view changes.

components.name: Pricing Card
components.description: Plan/pricing display card with feature list, price, billing period, and CTA
components.usage: Use in a row of 2-4 plans. Highlight recommended plan with featured variant. Show annual savings. Keep feature lists comparable.
components.a11y: Use clear heading for plan name. Feature list uses <ul>. CTA button is the primary action. Indicate featured plan.

components.name: Testimonial
components.description: Customer quote display with attribution, avatar, role, and company
components.usage: Use for social proof on landing pages. Include real names and roles. Card variant for standalone, carousel for multiple.
components.a11y: Use <blockquote> with <cite>. Avatar is decorative. Carousel has pause/navigation controls.

components.name: FAB
components.description: Floating action button for primary screen-level action, fixed positioned
components.usage: Use for the single most important action on a screen (create, compose). One FAB per view. Extended variant includes text label.
components.a11y: Use <button> with aria-label. Extended FAB includes visible text. Ensure not obscuring content. Keyboard accessible.

components.name: Video Player
components.description: Video playback component powered by Plyr with brand-themed controls
components.usage: Wrap a <video> element. Initialize with new Plyr('#id'). Use .or-video-player-sm for compact variant.
components.a11y: Plyr provides built-in keyboard controls and screen reader support. Add captions via <track> element.

components.name: Video Card
components.description: Thumbnail card with play overlay, duration badge, title and metadata
components.usage: Use in .or-video-grid for responsive thumbnail layouts. Overlay shows play button on hover.
components.a11y: Use alt text on thumbnail images. Ensure play button is keyboard-focusable.

components.name: Carousel
components.description: Image slider with prev/next buttons and dot navigation
components.usage: Use translateX on .or-carousel-track to navigate slides. Toggle .active on dots.
components.a11y: Add aria-label to prev/next buttons. Use aria-roledescription='carousel' on container.

components.name: Context Menu
components.description: Right-click menu with items, separators, shortcuts, and danger variants
components.usage: Position with JS on contextmenu event. Toggle .or-active to show/hide. Close on outside click.
components.a11y: Use role='menu' on container, role='menuitem' on items. Support arrow key navigation.

components.name: Avatar Group
components.description: Stacked avatar row with overflow count indicator
components.usage: Nest .or-avatar elements inside. Use .or-avatar-overflow for +N count. Uses flex-direction: row-reverse.
components.a11y: Each avatar needs alt text or aria-label. Overflow badge should state count.

components.name: Inline Edit
components.description: Click-to-edit text field with pencil icon and focus state
components.usage: Toggle .editing class on click. Contains an <input> that becomes editable. Remove .editing on blur.
components.a11y: Input must have aria-label. Announce edit mode to screen readers.

components.name: Callout
components.description: Bordered aside block with icon, title, and message in info/warning/error/success variants
components.usage: Use for important contextual messages. Variant determines color and icon. Always include a title.
components.a11y: Use role='note' or role='alert' for error/warning variants. Icon must have aria-hidden='true'.

components.name: Loading Overlay
components.description: Blurred overlay with spinner for indicating loading state on any container
components.usage: Place inside a position:relative container. Use spinner sizes for different contexts.
components.a11y: Add aria-busy='true' to the parent container. Spinner should have role='status' and aria-label='Loading'.

components.name: Cookie Banner
components.description: Fixed bottom banner for cookie consent with accept/manage actions
components.usage: Toggle .or-active to show/hide with slide-up animation. Position is fixed bottom center.
components.a11y: Use role='dialog' and aria-label. Focus should move to banner when shown.

components.name: Countdown Timer
components.description: Countdown display with days, hours, minutes, seconds and separator
components.usage: Update values with JS setInterval. Use tabular-nums font variant for stable widths.
components.a11y: Use aria-live='polite' on the countdown container. Announce significant milestones.

components.name: Combobox
components.description: Searchable select with filterable dropdown options
components.usage: Searchable select with filterable dropdown options.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Bottom Sheet
components.description: Mobile-friendly slide-up panel from bottom edge
components.usage: Mobile-friendly slide-up panel from bottom edge.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Switch Group
components.description: Grouped toggle switches with labels and descriptions
components.usage: Grouped toggle switches with labels and descriptions.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Split Button
components.description: Primary action button with attached dropdown for secondary actions
components.usage: Primary action button with attached dropdown for secondary actions.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Speed Dial
components.description: Floating action button that expands to reveal multiple actions
components.usage: Floating action button that expands to reveal multiple actions.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Search Autocomplete
components.description: Search input with live suggestion results and highlight matching
components.usage: Search input with live suggestion results and highlight matching.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Expandable Search
components.description: Compact search icon that expands into a full input field
components.usage: Compact search icon that expands into a full input field.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Multi Select
components.description: Multiple selection input with removable tag chips
components.usage: Multiple selection input with removable tag chips.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Code Block
components.description: Syntax-highlighted code display with language label and copy button
components.usage: Syntax-highlighted code display with language label and copy button.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Keyboard Shortcut
components.description: Styled keyboard shortcut display with key combinations
components.usage: Styled keyboard shortcut display with key combinations.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Scroll Area
components.description: Custom-scrollbar container for overflow content
components.usage: Custom-scrollbar container for overflow content.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Collapsible
components.description: Simple collapsible panel with toggle trigger
components.usage: Simple collapsible panel with toggle trigger.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Resizable Panel
components.description: Panel with draggable resize handle for adjustable width/height
components.usage: Panel with draggable resize handle for adjustable width/height.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Hover Card
components.description: Rich content card that appears on hover over a trigger
components.usage: Rich content card that appears on hover over a trigger.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Alert Dialog
components.description: Confirmation dialog with icon, title, description, and action buttons
components.usage: Confirmation dialog with icon, title, description, and action buttons.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Radio Card
components.description: Radio button presented as a selectable card with title and description
components.usage: Radio button presented as a selectable card with title and description.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Checkbox Card
components.description: Checkbox presented as a selectable card with visual check indicator
components.usage: Checkbox presented as a selectable card with visual check indicator.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Data List
components.description: Key-value pair list for displaying entity properties
components.usage: Key-value pair list for displaying entity properties.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: KPI metric display with large value, label, and trend indicator
components.usage: KPI metric display with large value, label, and trend indicator.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Feature highlight card with icon, title, and description
components.usage: Feature highlight card with icon, title, and description.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Team Member Card
components.description: Person card with avatar, name, role, and social links
components.usage: Person card with avatar, name, role, and social links.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Social Proof
components.description: Trust badge bar with grayscale logos that colorize on hover
components.usage: Trust badge bar with grayscale logos that colorize on hover.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Chip Group
components.description: Grouped selectable chips for multi-filter selection
components.usage: Grouped selectable chips for multi-filter selection.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Status Timeline
components.description: Horizontal step progress with complete/current/pending states
components.usage: Horizontal step progress with complete/current/pending states.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Comparison Table
components.description: Feature comparison grid with check/cross indicators and highlight column
components.usage: Feature comparison grid with check/cross indicators and highlight column.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: File Preview Card
components.description: File card with type-colored icon badge, name, and metadata
components.usage: File card with type-colored icon badge, name, and metadata.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Toast Stack
components.description: Fixed position stack of notification toasts with slide-in animation
components.usage: Fixed position stack of notification toasts with slide-in animation.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Command Bar
components.description: Inline search and action bar with input and command buttons
components.usage: Inline search and action bar with input and command buttons.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Search Results
components.description: Search result list with thumbnail, title, URL, and description
components.usage: Search result list with thumbnail, title, URL, and description.
components.a11y: Follow ARIA best practices. Ensure keyboard accessibility.

components.name: Filter Panel
components.description: Sidebar filter panel with grouped options, counts, and clear action
components.usage: Sidebar filter panel with grouped options, counts, and clear action.

templates.name: Dashboard
templates.description: Analytics dashboard layout with stat cards, charts area, recent activity, and data table

templates.name: Settings Page
templates.description: User/account settings with tabbed sections, form controls, and save actions

templates.name: Auth Flow
templates.description: Login, register, forgot password, and OTP verification screens

templates.name: Listing Page
templates.description: Filtered and paginated item listing with search, filters, and grid/list view toggle

templates.name: Detail Page
templates.description: Entity detail view with metadata, timeline, comments, and related items

templates.name: Kanban Workflow
templates.description: Project management board with columns, cards, filters, and quick-add

templates.name: Pricing Page
templates.description: Plan comparison page with pricing cards, feature matrix, and testimonials

templates.name: Notification Center
templates.description: Full notification management with panel, preferences, and history

templates.name: Video Player
templates.description: Full-featured video player with controls, progress bar, volume, and fullscreen support
templates.usage: Use to present video content with branded OpenReel controls; prefer minimal variant inside cards.
templates.a11y: Include captions track and aria-label on all control buttons; support keyboard playback via Space/Enter.

templates.name: Video Card
templates.description: Card component displaying a video thumbnail, title, metadata, and action buttons
templates.usage: Use to display a video asset in a grid or list; pair with Badge for status and Avatar for the creator.
templates.a11y: Use semantic <article> element, provide alt text for thumbnail image, and label all icon-only actions.

templates.name: Carousel
templates.description: Horizontally scrollable carousel with navigation arrows, pagination dots, and optional autoplay
templates.usage: Use for hero media, template galleries, or featured content sliders; avoid more than 7 slides without pagination.
templates.a11y: Wrap in role="region" with aria-label, expose prev/next buttons with aria-label, and pause autoplay on focus.

templates.name: Context Menu
templates.description: Right-click triggered contextual menu with grouped actions and keyboard navigation
templates.usage: Trigger on contextmenu event over a target element; use groups and separators to organize related actions.
templates.a11y: Use role="menu" with role="menuitem" children; support arrow key navigation, Escape to close, and Home/End keys.

templates.name: Avatar Group
templates.description: Stacked group of avatars with overflow count indicator and tooltip on hover
templates.usage: Use to show collaborators, participants, or assignees; display overflow count when list exceeds max.
templates.a11y: Wrap in a list element, give each avatar a descriptive aria-label, and expose the full names via tooltip.

templates.name: Inline Edit
templates.description: Click-to-edit text field that toggles between a display label and an editable input
templates.usage: Use for table cells, titles, or settings where inline editing reduces modal overhead.
templates.a11y: Display label must be focusable via Tab; trigger edit on Enter/Space; confirm with Enter and cancel with Escape.

templates.name: Callout
templates.description: Inline informational block with icon, title, and body text for contextual guidance
templates.usage: Use within forms or content pages to provide non-blocking guidance; prefer over Toast for persistent messages.
templates.a11y: Apply role="note" for informational, role="alert" for error/warning variants; never rely on color alone.

templates.name: Loading Overlay
templates.description: Full-surface overlay with spinner and optional message to block interaction during async operations
templates.usage: Use to block a panel or full page during data fetching or form submission; always show a spinner with status text.
templates.a11y: Set aria-busy="true" on the parent, use role="status" with a live region message, and trap focus inside overlay.

templates.name: Cookie Banner
templates.description: GDPR-compliant cookie consent banner with accept, decline, and customize actions
templates.usage: Display once per session until the user makes a consent choice; persist preference to localStorage.
templates.a11y: Use role="dialog" with aria-label, ensure all buttons are keyboard reachable, and never auto-dismiss without user action.

templates.name: Countdown Timer
templates.description: Live countdown timer displaying days, hours, minutes, and seconds until a target date
templates.usage: Use for event launch dates, offer expiry, or session timeouts; trigger onExpire callback when time reaches zero.
templates.a11y: Announce updates via aria-live="polite" at a maximum of once per minute to avoid screen reader noise.

guidelines.spacing:
Use the spacing scale consistently. Every layout decision — padding, margin, gap — must reference a token.

**Scale:** --space-1 (4px), --space-1h (6px), --space-2 (8px), --space-2h (10px), --space-3 (12px), --space-4 (16px), --space-5 (20px), --space-6 (24px), --space-8 (32px).

**Rules:**
- Component internal padding: --space-2 (8px) to --space-4 (16px) depending on size variant
- Gap between sibling elements within a component: --space-2 (8px) to --space-3 (12px)
- Gap between distinct UI sections: --space-6 (24px) to --space-8 (32px)
- Inline icon-to-label spacing: --space-1h (6px) for sm, --space-2 (8px) for md
- Never use arbitrary pixel values (padding: 15px, margin: 13px) — always pick the nearest scale step
- The 4px base unit is the atom; all tokens are multiples of it

**Do:**
```css
.or-card { padding: var(--space-6); gap: var(--space-4); }
.or-btn--sm { padding: var(--space-1h) var(--space-3); }
```
**Don't:**
```css
.or-card { padding: 22px; } /* arbitrary */
.or-btn--sm { padding: 5px 11px; } /* not on scale */
```
guidelines.typography:
Inter is the sole typeface for all OpenReel UI. Never substitute another font family.

**Type scale:** --text-xs (10px), --text-sm (12px), --text-base (14px), --text-md (16px), --text-lg (18px), --text-xl (20px), --text-2xl (24px).

**Weight rules:**
- Headings and section labels: font-weight: var(--font-semibold) /* 600 */
- Button labels and UI emphasis: font-weight: var(--font-medium) /* 500 */
- Body copy, helper text, descriptions: font-weight: var(--font-regular) /* 400 */

**Usage rules:**
- Base UI size is 14px (--text-base) — never go below --text-sm (12px) for interactive elements
- Limit any single view to 2-3 distinct type sizes to maintain hierarchy
- Pair each font size with its corresponding line-height token: --leading-base (24px) with --text-base, --leading-sm (20px) with --text-sm, etc.
- Letter spacing: tight (-0.02em) for large display text, normal (0) for body, wide (0.04em) for uppercase labels

**Do:**
```css
h2 { font-size: var(--text-xl); font-weight: var(--font-semibold); line-height: var(--leading-xl); }
p { font-size: var(--text-base); font-weight: var(--font-regular); line-height: var(--leading-base); }
```
**Don't:**
```css
h2 { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; } /* off-scale size, unsupported weight */
p { font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; } /* wrong font */
```
guidelines.color_usage:
The palette has three layers: brand, semantic gray, and status. Use each layer for its intended purpose only.

**Brand layer:** var(--brand) (#1F12DE) is reserved for primary CTAs, active states, focus rings, and key links. var(--brand-hover) (#1a0fbc) is only for hover/active states of brand elements. var(--brand-light) (rgba(31,18,222,0.1)) is for brand-tinted backgrounds — badges, highlights, selected rows.

**Gray text hierarchy:**
- Primary text: var(--gray-900) / semantic var(--text-primary)
- Secondary / supporting text: var(--gray-600) / var(--text-secondary)
- Placeholder / disabled text: var(--gray-400) / var(--text-placeholder)

**Status colors:**
- Success states: var(--success-500) for text/icons, var(--success-50) for backgrounds
- Error states: var(--error-500) for text/icons, var(--error-50) for backgrounds
- Warning states: var(--warning-700) for text/icons, var(--warning-50) for backgrounds
- Info: var(--blue-500) for text/icons, var(--blue-50) for backgrounds

**Rules:**
- Never use color as the sole indicator of meaning — always pair with an icon or text label
- Never introduce new hex values; extend the existing palette
- Decorative or illustration colors must not bleed into UI component tokens

**Do:**
```css
.or-badge--success { background: var(--success-50); color: var(--success-700); }
.or-btn--primary { background: var(--brand); }
```
**Don't:**
```css
.or-btn--primary { background: #2200ff; } /* raw hex outside palette */
.error-msg { color: red; } /* not a token */
```
guidelines.dark_mode:
Dark mode is activated by adding the class `dark` to the `<html>` element. All semantic color tokens automatically resolve to their dark equivalents — no component-level overrides needed.

**Dark surface tokens:**
- Page background: var(--bg-primary) → #0C111D
- Elevated surfaces (cards, panels): var(--bg-secondary) → #161B26
- Interactive hover/active state: var(--bg-tertiary) → #1F242F
- Input background, table rows: var(--bg-quaternary) → #2B3040

**Dark text tokens:**
- Primary text: var(--text-primary) → #F5F5F6
- Secondary / supporting text: var(--text-secondary) → #94969C
- Tertiary / disabled: var(--text-tertiary) → #85888E

**Dark border tokens:**
- Default borders: var(--border-primary) → #333741
- Subtle separators: var(--border-secondary) → #1F242F

**Rules:**
- Always use semantic tokens (--bg-primary, --text-primary, etc.) rather than raw hex so dark mode works automatically
- Never hardcode dark colors like #0C111D in component CSS — that breaks light mode
- Test every component state (hover, focus, disabled, error) in both modes before shipping
- Shadows typically need to be stronger in dark mode — use --shadow-md or higher

**Do:**
```css
.or-card { background: var(--bg-primary); color: var(--text-primary); border-color: var(--border-primary); }
```
**Don't:**
```css
.or-card { background: #0C111D; } /* hard-coded, breaks in light mode */
.dark .or-card { color: #F5F5F6; } /* unnecessary — token handles it */
```
guidelines.accessibility:
All components must meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA as a minimum. This is non-negotiable. **Contrast requirements:** - Normal text (under 18px regular / 14px bold): minimum 4.5:1 ratio - Large text (18px+ regular or 14px+ bold) and UI component boundaries: minimum 3:1 ratio - Non-text indicators (icons, borders for input state): minimum 3:1 against adjacent color **Keyboard interaction:** - All interactive elements must be reachable and operable by keyboard alone (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, Space, Arrow keys) - Focus order must follow DOM order — never use tabindex > 0 - Visible focus indicator required: `outline: 2px solid var(--brand); outline-offset: 2px;` minimum - Modal dialogs must trap focus while open and restore focus on close **Semantic HTML:** - Use ` Email is required ``` **Don't:** ```html
Save
```
guidelines.responsive:
Build mobile-first. Start with the smallest viewport and layer enhancements upward.

**Breakpoints:**
- sm: 640px — larger phones, landscape mobile
- md: 768px — tablets, small laptops
- lg: 1024px — standard desktop
- xl: 1280px — wide desktop

**Component behavior by breakpoint:**
- **Tables:** Horizontal scroll on mobile (`overflow-x: auto`); consider card-list layout below md
- **Navigation:** Sidebar collapses to hamburger / bottom nav below lg; top nav collapses below md
- **Modals:** Full-screen below md (`width: 100vw; height: 100vh; border-radius: 0`)
- **Grids:** Stack to single column below sm; 2-col below md; 3+ col at lg and above
- **Forms:** Full-width inputs on mobile; side-by-side labels allowed at md+

**Touch targets:**
- Minimum 44x44px tap target for all interactive elements on mobile
- Increase padding rather than element size when needed: `padding: var(--space-3)` achieves this for most components

**Fluid spacing:**
- Use --space-4 (16px) for mobile internal padding, step up to --space-6 (24px) at md+
- Section gaps: --space-6 on mobile, --space-8 at lg+

**Do:**
```css
.or-modal { width: 100%; border-radius: 0; } /* mobile */
@media (min-width: 768px) { .or-modal { width: var(--modal-md); border-radius: var(--radius-xl); } }
```
**Don't:**
```css
.or-modal { width: 560px; } /* fixed — breaks on small screens */
```
guidelines.motion:
Motion must serve communication, not decoration. Every animation should help the user understand what changed and why.

**Duration tokens:**
- --duration-instant (50ms): Immediate feedback — checkbox checks, toggle flips, button presses
- --duration-fast (100ms): Tooltip appears, badge state change, color transitions
- --duration-normal (200ms): Default for most UI transitions — dropdown open, panel slide, tab switch
- --duration-slow (300ms): Larger surface entrances — modal open, drawer slide, page transitions

**Easing tokens:**
- --ease-default `cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1)`: General purpose — most hover/focus state transitions
- --ease-in `cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1)`: Elements leaving the screen (fade-out, slide-out)
- --ease-out `cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1)`: Elements entering the screen (fade-in, slide-in) — feels natural
- --ease-spring `cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)`: Playful micro-interactions with slight overshoot — FAB, badge pop

**Rules:**
- Never exceed 400ms for any single UI transition (feels slow/broken)
- Always provide `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` overrides — set transition: none or duration: 1ms
- Loading skeletons use a subtle pulse — 1.5s infinite ease-in-out, never distracting
- Entrance animations: combine opacity (0→1) with a small translate (8-12px) for depth
- Exit animations: faster than entrances — use --duration-fast for dismissal

**Do:**
```css
.or-dropdown { transition: opacity var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out), transform var(--duration-normal) var(--ease-out); }
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .or-dropdown { transition: none; } }
```
**Don't:**
```css
.or-btn { transition: all 0.5s ease; } /* too slow, too broad */
.or-modal { animation: spin 1s linear infinite; } /* decorative, disorienting */
```
